subcodes.first_line: O thou whom I shall never forget! Where is there room for forgetfulness? Nay, rather, freedom from thy remembrance is impossible and inconceivable [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای که هرگز فرامشت نکنم نسیانرا کجا مجال بلکه فراغت از یاد شما ممتنع و محال هر
subcodes.subjects: @autobiographical account; narrative of Abdu'l-Baha, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @permission for visit; pilgrimage
